text_chunk: Good afternoon, everyone. Thank you for joining NVIDIA's third quarter fiscal 2025 earnings call. We're pleased to report continued strong execution across our business.
rationale: 어닝콜 개시. 초기 발언, 추세 미형성.

text_chunk: Revenue for the third quarter reached a record 35.1 billion dollars, representing 94 percent growth year-over-year and 17 percent sequentially, driven by exceptional demand for our data center products.
rationale: 전체 매출 YoY +94% 달성. 긍정 신호 시작.

text_chunk: Our data center segment achieved a record 30.8 billion dollars in the quarter, with strong contributions from both Hopper architecture and the initial ramp of our next-generation Blackwell platform.
rationale: 데이터센터 308억으로 폭발적 성장. Blackwell 초도 출하 개시.

text_chunk: I'm pleased to report that Blackwell production is ramping faster than initially planned. Customer demand continues to significantly exceed our supply capacity, and we expect this trend to persist.
rationale: Blackwell 생산 일정 초과 달성. 수요가 공급을 지속 초과.

text_chunk: The supply-demand imbalance for our AI infrastructure products is expected to continue well into 2025, as leading cloud providers and enterprises accelerate their AI compute investments.
rationale: 공급 부족 2025년까지 지속 전망. 하이퍼스케일러 투자 지속 확인.

text_chunk: Gross margin for the quarter expanded to 74.6 percent, reflecting the premium value of our products and improving operational efficiency as we scale our manufacturing partnerships.
rationale: 매출총이익률 74.6% 달성. 강한 가격 결정력 확인.

text_chunk: Gaming revenue reached 3.3 billion dollars, growing 15 percent year-over-year as RTX 40 series adoption continues to accelerate globally, particularly in the high-end segment.
rationale: 게이밍 회복세 확인. 전 사업부 고른 성장세.

text_chunk: Our automotive segment delivered 449 million dollars, representing 72 percent year-over-year growth, as DRIVE platform design wins from prior years are now converting into meaningful production revenue.
rationale: 자동차 YoY +72% 달성. EMA 임계치 상향 돌파 — 매수 신호 발생.

text_chunk: For the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025, we expect revenue of approximately 37.5 billion dollars, plus or minus 2 percent. This guidance reflects our continued strong pipeline and execution capability.
rationale: Q4 가이던스 375억 제시. 실적 모멘텀 지속 확인.

text_chunk: I do want to address the impact of export control regulations on our China business. These restrictions reduced our data center revenue by approximately 1 to 2 billion dollars in the quarter.
rationale: 중국 수출규제로 10~20억 달러 매출 손실 언급. 단기 리스크 요인.

text_chunk: However, we are seeing robust demand from hyperscalers in North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific that has more than offset the impact of China restrictions on our overall revenue trajectory.
rationale: 北美·유럽 수요로 중국 규제 영향 상쇄. 지역 다변화 확인.

text_chunk: Our networking revenue, including Spectrum-X Ethernet solutions, reached an all-time high this quarter, demonstrating the breadth of our AI infrastructure portfolio beyond just compute.
rationale: 네트워킹 매출 역대 최고. AI 인프라 포트폴리오 확장.

text_chunk: We returned 2.8 billion dollars to shareholders through stock buybacks during the quarter, reflecting our confidence in NVIDIA's long-term growth opportunity and strong free cash flow generation.
rationale: 자사주 28억 매입. 경영진 장기 성장 자신감 시사.

text_chunk: Looking ahead, we expect to begin sampling the Blackwell Ultra platform in early 2025, maintaining our technology roadmap cadence and ensuring continued leadership in AI accelerated computing.
rationale: Blackwell Ultra 2025년 초 샘플링 예고. 기술 리더십 지속.

text_chunk: We are at the very beginning of a massive platform transition. Every industry, every enterprise will need to fundamentally reinvent their IT infrastructure for the AI era. NVIDIA is uniquely positioned to lead this transformation.
rationale: AI 플랫폼 전환의 시작점 선언. EMA 임계치 재돌파 — 매수 신호 재발생.

text_chunk: In summary, NVIDIA delivered another quarter of record results, demonstrating strong execution across all business segments. We remain highly confident in our ability to capture the extraordinary opportunity ahead.
rationale: 사상 최고 실적 마무리. 전 사업부 강한 모멘텀. 매수 신호 유지.
